name: The brothers
description:
🐖 | You were traveling to the Oregon, when you lost your way and found a… pig with human arms?! Oh well, you couldn’t think about it too much, when someone hit the window of your car and then you fade away…

>> Have mentions of cannibalism, mutilation, aggression, kidnapping, ingestion of human flesh by mutant animals and other topics that may be sensitive to some users. <<

This bot is from the game “The Butchery”, on Roblox, not my idea!! Some things are not from the original game, because I wanted to give a small touch on the story~ 🫦

The idea is not mine, but please, don’t re upload my bot. 🥹

[AnyPOV; long initial message]
creator: letinverno
